description: Fresh cash injected at this rebalance. Combined with any cash above target, it forms the net inflow the optimizer must deploy (BUY - SELL = net inflow).
Tolerance band around every allocation target. The LP uses it as the hard ceiling and the dashboard uses it as the traffic-light threshold.
If TRUE the optimizer can only buy. Useful for accumulation phases.
If TRUE and the LP is infeasible at target_tolerance, search for the smallest feasible tolerance up to relax_cap.
Upper safety bound for the auto-relax search.
Penalty in the LP objective for residual EUR drift outside the tolerance band. 0 = pure minimum-trading rebalance. 1 = balanced (default). Higher values close out-of-band drift more aggressively.
Fixed EUR fee paid for each executed BUY.
Fixed EUR fee paid for each executed SELL.
Capital gains tax rate applied to ETFs and equities when selling at a profit.
Capital gains tax rate applied to government bonds (typically lower than the standard rate).
Reference date for portfolio age and inception-anchored stats.
Absolute EUR cash buffer kept in the portfolio.
Target weight of equities in the invested portfolio. All target_invested_allocation_*_pctg keys must sum to 100.
Target weight of fixed income in the invested portfolio.
Target weight of gold in the invested portfolio.
Target weight of broad commodities in the invested portfolio.
Target weight of crypto in the invested portfolio.
Target weight of alternative assets in the invested portfolio.
Target weight of US equities within the equity sleeve. All target_equity_geo_*_pctg keys must sum to 100.
Target weight of Japanese equities within the equity sleeve.
Target weight of Eurozone (EMU) equities within the equity sleeve.
Target weight of developed markets ex-US ex-EMU ex-Japan.
Target weight of emerging market equities.
